description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a small porch area, a main entry door, and a landscaped garden with a tree and shrubs. The exterior walls are primarily white with some pink accents, and there are large windows on both floors, especially at the front and rear. The rear side includes a balcony and a wooden double-door entry, while the sides are mostly solid with minimal window openings. The roof is flat and appears to have a recessed section, possibly for a terrace or skylight. The house is surrounded by paved walkways and a small green area, making it suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with white and pink exterior walls, large windows, and landscaped front and rear gardens. Features include a front porch, balcony, and wooden double-door entry at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, porch, landscaped garden, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, minimal windows, and the extension of the garden and paved walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden double-door entry, balcony, and pink wall accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more solid wall surfaces, a few windows, and the garden area visible at the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows at front and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single door with a small porch, steps, and landscaped garden; rear entry has a wooden double-door and balcony above.
